  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "# XVA (CVA + FVA) via Deep Picard Iteration\n",
    "\n",
    "This notebook solves the nonlinear XVA BSDE for a caplet portfolio using the\n",
    "[dim-fbsde](https://github.com/bilalhusain126/dim-fbsde) solver.\n",
    "\n",
    "The BSDE is:\n",
    "$$-dXVA_t = f(t, F(t), XVA_t)\\,dt - Z_t \\cdot dW_t^Q, \\quad XVA_T = 0$$\n",
    "\n",
    "where the driver $f$ aggregates CVA cost, FVA funding recursion, and intensity discounting.\n",
    "The nonlinearity arises from the funding terms $(\\bar V - XVA - C)^\\pm$."
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 1,
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "import sys\n",
    "import os\n",
    "\n",
    "# Add paths for local packages\n",
    "sys.path.insert(0, \"..\")\n",
    "\n",
    "import numpy as np\n",
    "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
    "\n",
    "from plot_style import setup_publication_style\n",
    "setup_publication_style()\n",
    "%config InlineBackend.figure_format = 'retina'\n",
    "\n",
    "from Caplet_portfolio_data import example_build_problem\n",
    "from xva_equation import XVACapletEquation, solve_xva"
   ]
  },

   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## 1. Build Market Data & Simulate Forward Paths\n",
    "\n",
    "We start with a small problem (d=10 forwards, T=5y, monthly steps) for quick iteration."
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 2,
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [
    {
     "name": "stdout",
     "output_type": "stream",
     "text": [
      "Forwards: d=10\n",
      "Portfolio: M=50 caplets\n",
      "Paths: 5000, Time steps: 61\n",
      "Horizon: T=5.0y, dt=0.0833\n",
      "Counterparty: lambda=0.015, R=0.4\n",
      "Funding: s_b=0.01, s_l=0.0\n"
     ]
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "# Build the problem using the numpy infrastructure\n",
    "problem, meta = example_build_problem(\n",
    "    d=10,\n",
    "    T_max=5.0,\n",
    "    dt=1.0 / 12.0,\n",
    "    n_paths=5000,\n",
    "    seed=42,\n",
    "    threshold_H=5000,\n",
    ")\n",
    "\n",
    "data = problem.data\n",
    "print(f\"Forwards: d={meta['d']}\")\n",
    "print(f\"Portfolio: M={meta['M']} caplets\")\n",
    "print(f\"Paths: {data.X.shape[0]}, Time steps: {data.X.shape[1]}\")\n",
    "print(f\"Horizon: T={meta['T_max']}y, dt={meta['dt']:.4f}\")\n",
    "print(f\"Counterparty: lambda={meta['lambda_C']}, R={meta['recovery_C']}\")\n",
    "print(f\"Funding: s_b={meta['funding_spread_b']}, s_l={meta['funding_spread_l']}\")"
   ]
  },

    "axes[2].legend()\n",

    "plt.show()"

   "source": [
    "out = solve_xva(\n",
    "    d=10,\n",
    "    T_max=5.0,\n",
    "    dt=1.0 / 12.0,\n",
    "    n_paths=3000,\n",
    "    picard_iterations=10,\n",
    "    epochs=5,\n",
    "    learning_rate=1e-4,\n",
    "    hidden_dims=[256, 256],\n",
    "    threshold_H=1e6,\n",
    "    seed=42,\n",
    "    device=\"cpu\",\n",
    ")\n",
    "\n",
    "print(f\"\\nXVA_0 = {out['XVA_0']:.4f}\")"
   ]

    "## 4. Convergence Analysis"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 5,
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "image/png": "",
      "text/plain": [
       "<Figure size 1200x400 with 2 Axes>"
      ]
     },
     "metadata": {
      "image/png": {
       "height": 388,
       "width": 1186
      }
     },
     "output_type": "display_data"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "history = out['result']['history']\n",
    "\n",
    "fig, axes = plt.subplots(1, 2, figsize=(12, 4))\n",
    "\n",
    "# Picard iteration error\n",
    "errors = [h['error'] for h in history]\n",
    "axes[0].semilogy(range(1, len(errors) + 1), errors, 'o-')\n",
    "axes[0].set_xlabel('Picard Iteration')\n",
    "axes[0].set_ylabel(r'RMSE ($\\|Y^{(k)} - Y^{(k-1)}\\|$)')\n",
    "axes[0].set_title('Picard Convergence')\n",
    "\n",
    "# Y training loss\n",
    "y_losses = [np.mean(h['y_loss']) for h in history]\n",
    "axes[1].semilogy(range(1, len(y_losses) + 1), y_losses, 's-', color='tab:orange')\n",
    "axes[1].set_xlabel('Picard Iteration')\n",
    "axes[1].set_ylabel(r'Mean $Y$ Loss (MSE)')\n",
    "axes[1].set_title('Training Loss')\n",
    "\n",
    "plt.tight_layout()\n",
    "plt.show()"
   ]
